title: Dark Chocolate Crunchy Noodle Bites
description: A sweet and crunchy snack made with dark chocolate and crunchy malaysian noodles.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the crunchy noodles and rye flour.
Melt the dark chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval until smooth.
Pour the melted chocolate over the noodle mixture and stir until well combined.
Scoop tablespoon-sized balls of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the edges are set.
Let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
